content: I was at the bus stop near the mall at 7:00 PM on March 17. I had just left my office and was waiting for the 7:10 bus to Delhi. I heard a crash, but I didn’t see the vehicle. I only heard a woman shout — 'Oh God, what have you done?' — right after the impact. I turned around but saw no one. I didn’t see the driver. I didn’t know Arjun was crossing. I had a fight with him earlier that day about the audit report. He threatened to expose me. But I didn’t harm him. I took the 7:15 bus. I have my ticket and the station CCTV to prove it.
